candidates.question: Find the recommended daily water intake for an 82 kg person. Then, ensure that value is restricted to fall between 67 and 162. Finally, determine the ratio of that adjusted amount to 16.
Calculate the volume of a cube with a side length of 10. Then, round that volume to one decimal place. Using that rounded result, find out how many complete groups of 5 fit into it.
Convert 1162 minutes past midnight into a clock time. Then, take the first four characters from that time text. Finally, use that four-character text to create a masked account number.
Convert 510 kilowatt-hours into megajoules. Take that result and divide it by 4. Then, multiply the resulting quotient by 16.

Count how many of these weights—79, 53, 80, 75—are above 75. Using that count, determine the pallets needed for that many boxes, assuming 4 boxes per layer and 4 layers per pallet. Finally, check if the number of pallets required exceeds 435.
